reviews.review_description: When we get up on the stage with her it would be cool if we could have a lyrics chat window. Whatever you guys are doing to make the rap artist level of detail show up in VR it is by far the best I have seen especially on clothes and logos. Please give us more trippy effects and DJ booth controls (the flying saucer thing is cool too). This has the best up close and personal VR details I have seen yet.

developer_response.body: lyric sheet is a great idea !!! im adding it today!! will push an update with this addition soon! thank you for the review and advice !

reviews.review_description: It has so much Potential when you get more songs, it will be even better. it's a good chill and hang out place

SCENEZ has truly proven that it has the best way to deliver virtual concert experiences! They don’t use those goofy 180 or 360 video recordings that limit you from truly being in the experience with full 6DOF. And they aren’t using old school motion capture with cartoonish game representations of a real person. Nothing else even comes close to the true to life artist performances that SCENEZ offers! You can literally walk up to and around the performers on stage not just watch a video of them! Absolutely incredible!
Scenez unleashes the power of live performance using unmatched volumetric capture quality in a city like setup. This app is revolutionizing BIG TIME the Entertainment-, Art-, and Sports-Industry .

Music comes alive for the first time in the VR space with musical performances that are fully 3D and so detailed you will be amazed. 

The VR space called Scenez is the best environment I have seen in the Oculus library. It’s fun, engaging, and it doesn’t look like it was built for 10 year old kid. 

You have to try several of the free portals and be amazed by the content. This is the next level for human performance in the virtual spaces and is a cool place to hang and meet up with friends.

reviews.review_title: Just, WOW. Next level home entertainment
reviews.review_description: I am a music fanatic. A friend recommended checking out SceneZ on my Oculus and I was so impressed how amazing the 3D Worlds are and the hologram performances going on by some pretty top tier artists like Stevie Stone, Juvahn (Who I know about from here in LA) and Digital Underground (old school!!). Really amazing way to see a concert from my couch at home. I also hear there are avatar comedy shows coming so I am excited to go check this out.
A huge level up of concerts and live events that beats Horizon’s by a landslide! Highly recommend!

Wow, I have never experienced any performances in VR like this. It’s a real hi-res live performance you can actually enter, walk up to the talent, and even own the stage with them. It’s super hi res so you can get slower to the performers in a way you never could in person. 
This is amazing stuff and it’s bringing us closer and closer to a real Star Trek Holodeck!

Never saw such high quality 4D captures as in scenez. It’s absolutely amazing to walk around the stage and see how real it looks.
There is a lot of content within the app that you get for free. Definitely worth a visit.

Futhings.

developer_response.body: more to come!! thank you for the review!!

reviews.review_description: I joined the SceneZ Crew in June of 2022, and I have loved it ever since! This game is so fun with so much cool music and games and stuff to do and I have enjoyed every little bit of playing this wonderful game! <3 With so much stuff to do, If you love meeting new people, talking and listening to unique songs, then SceneZ is the place for you!!! <3 - The Favorite Beta Tester

**Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)**

Scenez is nothing short of a revolutionary experience in the realm of augmented reality (AR) and virtual entertainment. This Oculus app merges cutting-edge technology with a deep appreciation for music, bringing you closer to your favorite artists like never before.

**Graphics:**

The graphics in Scenez are truly breathtaking. Every performance is rendered with stunning clarity, capturing the nuances of the artists' expressions and movements. The lifelike visuals create an immersive environment that makes you feel as though you're standing right in front of the stage. The seamless integration of AR elements into your surroundings adds an extra layer of realism, blurring the lines between the virtual and real worlds.

**Functionality:**

Functionality is where Scenez really shines. The app is intuitively designed, making it easy for users of all experience levels to navigate and enjoy. You can effortlessly browse through a library of performances, select your favorite artists, and even interact with them in real-time. The controls are responsive and smooth, ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish.

**The Future of Entertainment:**

Scenez is not just an app; it's a glimpse into the future of music, movies, and games. By allowing users to experience live performances in AR, it opens up new possibilities for how we consume and engage with entertainment. Imagine watching a concert from the comfort of your living room, feeling as though you're in the front row, or enjoying a movie where the characters come to life around you. The potential for gaming is equally exciting, with interactive elements that could redefine how we play and experience games.

**Conclusion:**

In conclusion, Scenez sets a new standard for what AR apps can achieve. Its exceptional graphics, user-friendly functionality, and transformative potential make it a must-have for any Oculus user. Whether you're a music lover, a movie buff, or a gaming enthusiast, this app promises to change the way you experience your favorite forms of entertainment. Download Scenez today and step into the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you!!! thats a whole lotta intel lol Much appreciated !

reviews.review_title: VIP Access: Epic Shows, Laughs, & Games!
reviews.review_description:
Scenez is lit! It's like nothing else I've ever experienced! It's like you've got a VIP pass to the hottest shows around. One moment, you're at the heart of a concert, feeling the bass thump, and the next, you're in stitches at a comedy gig with your fam. Scenez's Comedy Verse has legends like Slink Johnson, AKA Lamar from GTA. These comedians are off the chain. 

Up next, Stevie Stone's world is epic! We teleported into a gladiator arena from way back. It was all kinds of awesome. Then we cruised over to The Drop, and it's straight fire! I met some cool peeps while zipping around in a UFO—no biggie, just UFO cchillin' and vibing to the dope 360 views of Jay R, the King of Filipino R&B. There is so much more to do! I'll be back with my whole fam to hang out and explore Scenez! 🎮🎵🤣🏆

THE SCENEZ APP IS LIT! 🔥

There’s a communal city center designed like the future and lots of neat worlds to portal through! 

SCENEZ has vr concert tickets available to a variety of artists/genres. The aesthetic details on the concerts are incredibly high quality and the performances are accurate to the artist’s actual actions. These concerts aren’t like past animation folks, this is genuine artist performances being captured for the multiverse!

This is a brilliant way to connect with people. I love going to concerts IRL and find the same things I enjoy in the VR world. Community, conversation, and people enjoying the vibes of the room. 

It’s fun listening to music this immersive. I get turnt up in the Rich the Kid concert! Also Pixel Circus portal has a crazy freakshow you gotta see. I like chatting with new people, and getting on stage for freestyle rapping cyphers. I also love playing with the UFO’s in The Drop portal!

All in all, the SCENEZ app is a refreshing experience of entertainment. It’s a lot of fun and I can spend hours playing. I appreciate how it’s limitless in potential and ever expanding. This is amazing to see what’s there already in just its first release, and I can’t wait to see what’s in store for Scenez in future updates!

To enjoy a 3D performance in the comfort of your own home with friends from around the globe is mind boggling, and incredible.

This is definitely the future of viewing performances, content delivery, and an amazing place for everyone to gather and enjoy themselves.
This app is the reason everyone will now join VR.  The ultimate experience immersive music by the actual artist not a drawing and not an avatar.
